tasks.subject: Task 0: Project Scaffolding
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create a new Next.js project with all dependencies.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "tsconfig.json", "next.config.ts", "src/app/layout.tsx", "src/app/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dev server starts", "Tailwind renders", "shadcn/ui initialized", "TypeScript strict"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Prisma Schema & Database Setup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define all 7 game entities in Prisma and run initial migration.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/schema.prisma", "src/lib/prisma.ts", "src/types/game.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx prisma migrate dev --name init", "acceptanceCriteria": ["migration succeeds", "7 models visible", "types align"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Hex Coordinate Utilities & Map Data
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement hex math and default map layout.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/hex.ts", "src/lib/map-data.ts", "src/lib/__tests__/hex.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest src/lib/__tests__/hex.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["hex neighbors correct", "bounds filtering", "12 locations", "25 weather days"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Hex Map SVG Components
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build SVG hex grid with dual view modes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/map/HexTile.tsx", "src/components/map/ShipMarker.tsx", "src/components/map/HexGrid.tsx", "src/components/map/MapContainer.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev, visit /test-map", "acceptanceCriteria": ["hex grid renders", "location colors", "team mode", "facilitator mode", "pinch-to-zoom"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Game Actions — Create, Join, Start
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Server-side game logic for session creation, join, start.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/game-actions.ts", "src/lib/__tests__/game-actions.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest src/lib/__tests__/game-actions.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["createGame works", "join codes format", "joinGame validates", "startGame transitions", "startGame guard"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: API Route Handlers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Next.js API routes for game create/join/state/start.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/api/game/create/route.ts", "src/app/api/game/join/route.ts", "src/app/api/game/[sessionId]/route.ts", "src/app/api/game/start/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "curl test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["create works", "join validates", "session state", "start transitions", "error responses"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Custom Server with Socket.io
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Custom Node server with Socket.io room-based team isolation.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server.ts", "src/lib/socket.ts", "package.json"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev + browser console", "acceptanceCriteria": ["server starts", "rooms work", "facilitator events", "team isolation", "reconnection"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Facilitator Page — Create & Lobby
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Facilitator page with game creation and live lobby.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/facilitator/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "browser test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["create form", "lobby teams", "join URL", "real-time status", "start button", "desktop layout"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Join Page & Team Dashboard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Mobile join page and team dashboard with map + Socket.io.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/join/page.tsx", "src/app/play/[teamId]/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "browser test at 375px", "acceptanceCriteria": ["join flow", "map renders", "inventory", "socket connects", "facilitator sees", "sessionStorage", "mobile layout"]}
```
